positive: Maximalist abstract pattern illustration featuring interconnected geometric shapes and stylized tropical leaves (monstera, palm). The colors should be vibrant jewel tones (teal, mustard yellow, burnt orange) with a slight halftone dot effect. Perfect for repeating patterns.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic people, monochrome, empty space
